scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner interior matching image1 layout. Blonde waitress (image2) in ruby red blouse, black pencil skirt, and white waist apron unties her apron slowly, folding it over her arm, looking relieved. Beside her, brunette young woman (image3) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script stands watching. Behind the cash register: male clerk (image4) in white button-up shirt and black pants. On the diner floor serving tables: female waitress (image5) in ruby red blouse, black pencil skirt, and white waist apron. Customers seated in red booths and on counter stools. Bright morning light. No customers behind counter.
